Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kazan Ma Deret]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Kazan Ma Deret is a Kazan disciple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Kazan Ma Deret is an Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Kazan Ma Deret is a Forger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Kazan Ma Deret walks the Path of the Mountain’s Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Kazan Ma Deret is an Iron stage practitioner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Kazan Ma Deret has brown hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Kazan Ma Deret wears an iron badge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Kazan Ma Deret is a Forger and has learned the Path of the Mountain’s Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Kazan Ma Deret uses Forged red-brown bricks made of solid madra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
